The '''Academy of Jedi Archaeology''' was an academy that studied the history of the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] and [[Sith/Legends|Sith]]. Made up of [[Jedi Researcher]]s, the Academy sponsored studies on [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]] and [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]] during the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]. Working closely with the [[Exploration Corps/Legends|Exploration Corps]], the Academy's members would decipher texts and uncover artifacts before turning it over to their peers in the [[Educational Corps]].<ref name="TJP">[[The Jedi Path: A Manual for Students of the Force (real-life book)|''The Jedi Path: A Manual for Students of the Force'']]</ref>

==History==
During the seduction of [[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun]] to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], Kun traveled to Onderon and told [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Arca Jeth]] that he had authority granted unto him by the Academy to study the ancient [[Sith artifact/Legends|Sith artifacts]] that Jeth had stored on the planet. Gaining access, Kun continued on his spiral into darkness.<ref name="TOTJ">''[[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith]]''</ref> Following the [[Ruusan Reformations/Legends|Ruusan Reformation]] the Academy continued its work with the EduCorps and the ExplorCorps, helping to update the [[Jedi Archives/Legends|Jedi Archives]] as new things were discovered.<ref name="TJP" />
